Name: Noah
Text: The fire was easily extinguished using the fire extinguisher.
Toast1: “Fire Extinguisher: Keep one at home or in your car in case of fire."

Name: Noah
Text: And this is the cause of the fire.

Name: Noah
Text: When dust accumulates in an electric outlet, the risk of fire increases.

Name: Noah
Text: Also, If there’s water nearby, there’s a risk of electrocution. Be careful, please.

Name: Noah
Text: Of course, Never insert anything other than a plug (like chopsticks) into an outlet.

Name: Noah
Text: If there’s a fire, don’t hesitate to call 911.

Name: Mayor
Text: My goodness… So the homeowner caused the fire by plugging a ‘broken charger’ into the outlet!

Name: Noah
Text: Also, let them know that using too many plugs in one outlet can also cause a fire.

Name: Mayor
Text: Oh, thank you! Thank you so much!

Name: Mayor
Text: As expected, ‘Noah’s Ark’ can solve anything!

Name: Noah
Text: It’s nothing, just doing my job.

Name: Mayor
Text: I’m really grateful. Here’s the reward I promised.

Name: Mayor
Text: I found an old newspaper while cleaning the attic,

Name: Mayor
Text: And it has an article about the detective agency ‘Noah’s Ark.’

Name: Mayor
Text: I thought you might find it interesting, so I brought it for you.

Name: Noah
Text: This is quite an old newspaper.
